title: Sky's Lootr Trophy
description: Remodelled Centennial Trophy from Lootr mod
body:
Remodels the Centennial Trophy from the Lootr mod to add a baseplate, rework the player pose, and use the un-opened chest texture.
The model will also update to use the correct texture based on your Lootr configuration. (e.g. will use a Vanilla chest texture if Vanilla Textures is enabled)
